description_long: This is a young adult woman with a distinctive undercut hairstyle, featuring a shaved head with a topknot. She is dressed in casual urban attire, wearing a fitted crop top and loose sweatpants with a drawstring waist. Her feet are covered with low-cut socks, and she is not wearing any shoes. The figure has a relaxed, natural standing posture with one arm slightly bent and the other resting by her side. Her facial features are neutral, and her build is average, suggesting a healthy adult. The overall appearance is modern and suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A casually dressed young woman with an undercut topknot hairstyle, wearing a crop top and sweatpants, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crop top, sweatpants, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the undercut hairstyle and the fit of the crop top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the topknot, the straps of the crop top, and the waistband of the sweatpants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile and the relaxed stance.
attribute_clothing_type: casual crop top and sweatpants with low-cut socks
